per_issue_rate_limit_bucket_size_minutes.description: Bucket window over which the per-issue rate limit applies, in minutes.

per_issue_rate_limit_value.description: Maximum number of exception events ingested per bucket for each individual issue. Null removes the limit.

project_rate_limit_bucket_size_minutes.description: Bucket window over which the project-wide rate limit applies, in minutes.

project_rate_limit_value.description: Maximum number of exception events ingested per bucket for the entire project. Null removes the limit.
